queries.question: What columns are common to all newspapers?
queries.sql: SELECT Columns.column_name  from Newspapers_Columns join Columns on Newspapers_Columns.column_id = Columns.id join Newspapers on Newspapers_Columns.newspaper_id = Newspapers.id   GROUP BY Newspapers_Columns.column_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Newspapers_Columns.newspaper_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Newspapers)

queries.question: Show me the columns each newspaper publishes.
queries.sql: select newspapers.name , columns.column_name from Newspapers_Columns join Columns on Newspapers_Columns.column_id = Columns.id join Newspapers on Newspapers_Columns.newspaper_id = Newspapers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?column_name WHERE {
  ?newspapers_columns a :Newspapers_Columns .
  ?columns a :Columns .
  ?newspapers_columns p:hasColumns ?columns .
  ?newspapers a :Newspapers .
  ?newspapers_columns p:hasNewspapers ?newspapers .
  ?newspapers p:name ?name .
  ?columns p:column_name ?column_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the columns each newspaper publishes.
